name: Double Chocolate Walnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter and flour a large baking sheet.
3. In a bowl, whisk together flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In another bowl with an electric mixer, beat together butter and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs and beat until combined well.
6. Stir in the flour mixture to form a stiff dough.
7. Stir in walnuts and chocolate chips.
8. On the prepared baking sheet with floured hands, form the dough into two slightly flattened logs, each 12 inches long and 2 inches wide, and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
9. Bake logs for 35 minutes, or until slightly firm to the touch.
10. Cool biscotti on the baking sheet for 5 minutes.
11. On a cutting board, cut biscotti diagonally into 3/4 inch slices.
12. Arrange biscotti, cut sides down, on the baking sheet and bake until crisp, about 10 minutes.
13. Cool biscotti on a rack.
14. Biscotti keep in an air-tight containers for 1 week and, frozen, for 1 month.
